titles.title: DeepCausalMMM: A Deep Learning Framework for Marketing Mix Modeling with Causal Structure Learning

citation.journal_title: Advances in neural information processing systems
citation.unstructured_citation: Zheng, X., Aragam, B., Ravikumar, P. K., & Xing, E. P. (2018). DAGs with NO TEARS: Continuous optimization for structure learning. Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, 31, 9472–9483. https://papers.nips.cc/paper/8157-dags-with-no-tears-continuous-optimization-for-structure-learning

citation.journal_title: Proceedings of the 17th ACM international conference on web search and data mining (WSDM ’24)
